overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a waterfront promenade during golden hour. The scene features a large roller coaster structure, palm trees, and futuristic city architecture. The character approaches a group of NPCs sitting on outdoor couches near an abandoned building before continuing along the boardwalk.

events.description: descending ramp from building exterior toward open waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete platform toward waterfront with debris scattered on ground

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking down stairway toward lower level

futuristic high-rise buildings with glass facades in the distance

safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete walkway next to a modern building, with the character's shadow visible on the ground. The camera moves forward toward a ramp descending to the waterfront, passing scattered debris. A distant pedestrian can be seen walking down a stairway on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with roller coaster and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along waterfront boardwalk with strong sun glare from the setting sun

entered.detail: large steel roller coaster tracks with tall support pillars silhouetted against sun
metal safety railing along the edge of the water
tall palm trees planted along the promenade walkway
wooden park bench facing the water
large vertical billboard with REAL WATER text and bottle advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront promenade bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera walks along the concrete boardwalk with a large roller coaster structure on the left and water on the right. Palm trees and benches line the path, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned building with makeshift outdoor lounge

events.description: slowing down and stopping to observe the group of NPCs sitting on couches

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping near group of NPCs relaxing on red couches outside abandoned building

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on red couch, one holding a drink
person wearing headphones sitting on separate couch

entered.detail: circular concrete structure with graffiti and metal security grates
three red upholstered couches arranged in outdoor lounge setup
yellow and white vending machine with digital display
colorful spray paint tags covering the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an abandoned circular building covered in graffiti where three NPCs are sitting on red couches in a makeshift outdoor lounge. The character slows to a stop to observe the group, with a vending machine visible to the left. The roller coaster structure remains visible in the background but more distant.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade continuing past lounge area

events.description: resuming forward movement past the abandoned building and NPCs

agents.ego_description: continuing along waterfront path past the lounge area and abandoned building

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking past the NPCs and abandoned building, continuing along the waterfront promenade. The roller coaster structure becomes more prominent again on the left as the camera moves away from the building, with the sun setting over the water creating long shadows on the concrete walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded concrete walkway into a wide, sun-drenched waterfront promenade. It begins on an elevated path beside a modern building, moving past scattered debris and a distant pedestrian toward a descending ramp. As the camera reaches the waterfront, the scene opens into a vast boardwalk bathed in golden hour light, flanked by a massive roller coaster structure and a vista of futuristic skyscrapers. The movement then slows as the camera approaches an abandoned, graffiti-covered circular building where NPCs lounge on red couches near a vending machine. Finally, the character resumes their pace, passing the makeshift lounge and continuing along the concrete walkway as the setting sun casts long shadows across the path.
